description: Contracts defining the structure, interfaces, and dependencies for the Wuhan snacks static webpage.

text_content.header_subtitle: A Culinary Journey Through Central China
text_content.intro_paragraph: Wuhan, the capital of Hubei province, is famous for its vibrant street food culture. These snacks reflect the city's history as a major transportation hub, blending flavors from across China.
text_content.footer_text: © 2023 Wuhan Culinary Heritage | Static Demo Project

performance_targets.image_optimization: Compressed JPEGs with lazy loading consideration

images: All files exist in images/ directory
